MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCTAVIA INVESTMENT COMPANY LIMITED A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-13-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-19-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLLACK, STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1544 CALIFORNIA STREET #203 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-08-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE BY THE ABOVE DATE OF 4/8/97 PLTF.TO HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR MONEY IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 PAST DUE RENT, AND DAILY DAMAGES FROM 2/1/97 THROUGH 4/8/97 IF $11.66 PER DAY, AND ATTY FEES OF $650.00 WITH COST OF $195.00 SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR ADDITIONAL DETAILS.

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRE- SENT. VICTORIA STEINBERGER PRESENT AS PROPERTY MANAGER FOR PLAINTIFF. BARBARA MATTHEWS, PRO TEM. MARILYN NORMAN, REPORTER. D. CARTER, CLERK. CASE SETTLED BY JUDGMENT PURUSANT TO STIPULATION MADE IN OPEN COURT. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS.
